title: Abarema cuneadena
taxonomy: Abarema cuneadena is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It belongs to the genus Abarema, which consists of tropical trees native to Central and South America. The family Fabaceae is a large and diverse group of plants commonly known as legumes, characterized by their fruit pods that split open to release seeds. As part of the Fabaceae family, Abarema cuneadena is further classified as a member of the subfamily Caesalpinioideae. This classification reflects the plant's evolutionary relationships and its shared characteristics with other members of the Fabaceae family.
